Submission checklist authored (docs/SUBMISSION.md); local checks green. Manual outward steps (make repo public, live deploy URLs, Loom URL) documented for human action.

Taxonomy decided and recorded in --design: runtime Target (effects.py) is the single source of truth; authoring 'player'->'chooser', self->self, all->all, center=placement-only. Chooser plumbing bug filed as aiu (DONE). Alias-mapping impl filed as 4eh. Card-targeting spike filed as cbj. Human-confirmation note left in history; decision is sound and reversible. Deliverable (decided taxonomy + follow-ups) complete.

Design decided and recorded in --design: CardTarget is a separate axis from player Target (literals this/chosen_card/all_in_play/all_in_hand), needs ctx.chosen_card_id + _resolve_card_targets, and a 'card zones' model as prerequisite. Implementation deferred to follow-ups (spawned below). Human-confirmation note in history. Deliverable (design outcome) complete.

Downloaded all 700 curated album images into data/eval/images/ (gitignored); committed scraper (download_images.py) + tracked image_urls.json + manifest.json. Dependency on 75j bypassed: real i.imgur.com links came straight from the album's embedded postDataJSON, so no transcription/link-fix was needed to download. No API key or Playwright required.

Transcribed all 700 album photos via vision (28 batches x 25) into data/eval/real_cards.json with real Imgur URLs. Renamed 35-card gold set to eval_cards.json, stripped fake fallback image_urls. Repointed harness/tests/docs. 506 tests pass.

Superseded by 89z: real image URLs sourced from album postDataJSON (data/eval/image_urls.json, no IMGUR_CLIENT_ID needed) and full album transcribed by vision into real_cards.json (700 cards). Fake fallback URLs removed from the gold set (now eval_cards.json).

Annotated all 698 real_cards human_canonical via 28 subagent batches per CANONICAL_SPEC.md. Applied player-over-self rule (523 player / 101 self), richer targets (card/all_cards/none), placement vocab, and NEW venue axis (546 all / 152 in_person). Added venue to CardCanonical, validator, tests. 508 tests pass, 0 validation errors.
